commentaries.author: Ambrose of Milan
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And the land was not able to bear them, that they might dwell together: for their possessions were great, so that they could not dwell together. Ambrose of Milan In fact, since [Lot] had already deliberately begun to deviate from his uncle, the land could not support both of them dwelling together; indeed, no space can be large enough for those who love discord …. Even limited spaces are more than adequate for those who are meek and peaceloving, while for those whose mentality is one of discord even wide open spaces are too restricted.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: To bear or feed their flocks, as well as those of the Chanaanites. (Calmet)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
